title: 2 in 1 Air Water Bomb Balloon Pump Kids Party Outdoor Garden 100 Pieces Balloons Set
features: 2 IN 1 BALLOON PUMP WITH KNOTTING TOOL - 100 balloons are included!
EASY OPERATION - Save your breath when blowing up balloons because this pump will do it for you.
SIMPLE - Just attach a balloon and press the trigger to fill it up with air.
CREATE WATER BOMBS - You can even fill the pump with water to create your own water bombs - the perfect weapon for summer`s day!!
RECOMMENDED AGE - The Balloon Pump is for ages 8 and up. Please note: Colours vary.

The Magic Toy Shop - 2-in-1 Water Balloon Pump Merchant video Hours Of Super Fun Looking for a fun activity great with your little ones? Your kids will enjoy games with this water balloon pump. This amazing air and water balloon filler come with 100 good quality balloons in assorted colors, which you can either fill with air or water. Both are a big hit for everyone and will be a good way to ease your boredom. Colors will vary depending on availability. You can even fill the pump with water to create your water bombs - the perfect weapon for summer`s day! Great For Summer Activities Whether you go for an outdoor trip or a BBQ party, the water balloon inflator makes life easier. It will take away the stress of making the kids happy and busy. Blowing up lots of balloons in a relatively short period of time is a great weapon for your water games. Plus, it’s easy to take wherever and whenever you need it for party venues. PLEASE NOTE: One balloon pump is included, The balloon pump comes in assorted colours, and one colour is picked randomly. Beautiful Design These balloon inflators are super easy to use and a no-worry lifesaver. With 100 balloons included, just put one at a time on the nozzle, pump it a few times, and here you go. After filling the balloon with enough water or air, tie it off.
